description_long: This object is a slender kitchen knife with a straight, pointed blade made of dark metal, likely steel, featuring a subtle texture or pattern along its surface. The blade is single-edged and tapers to a fine tip, suitable for precision slicing or paring tasks. The handle is rectangular, smooth, and appears to be made of a light-colored material, possibly wood or plastic, with a uniform finish and no visible ergonomic contouring. There is no visible guard or bolster separating the blade from the handle, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The knife's construction suggests it is lightweight and designed for everyday kitchen use. No decorative elements or ornamentation are present on either the blade or handle.
description: A slim, pointed kitchen knife with a dark metal blade and a plain, light-colored rectangular handle. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible ornamentation or guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, pointed blade and the rectangular handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the flat, broad surface of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's edge and the handle's smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the blade's width and the handle's rectangular cross-section.
attribute_handle_design: rectangular, smooth, light-colored, no visible contouring or texture
